ddls:
CREATE TABLE "menu_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menu item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the item belongs to */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the menu item */,
  "serving_size" REAL /* Serving size of the menu item */,
  "serving_size_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the serving size (e.g., oz, g, fl oz) */,
  "calories" INTEGER /* Total calories per serving */,
  "calories_from_fat" INTEGER /* Calories from fat per serving */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the menu item */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the menu item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the menu item */,
  "is_discontinued" INTEGER /* Indicates if the item is discontinued */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image representing the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, nutritionist, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the menu item being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the menu item */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the menu item was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access event was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES menu_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_item_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a menu item */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the menu item */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the menu item */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes or updates in this version */,
  "version_data" TEXT /* JSON data representing the changes or updates in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_item_versions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES menu_items ("item_id")
)
